creator: jacob@whotookspaz.org
text:
I have word from the developer of Conspire that he has given up development on maintaining it. As it will probably begin declining in usability and there are a variety of current issues with it, I think it's best to put the port out to pasture and delete it.

Fix: 

Deletion of the port.
How-To-Repeat: Find yourself a frustrated developer :p.
